source: NHANES 2007-2012: THYROD_E/F/G joined to DR1TOT/DR2TOT, DEMO, BMX, VID, UIO
model_note: Weighted cross-sectional association model. Coefficients are association-based, not causal short-term meal effects.
feature_note: Nutrient densities are standardized per 1000 kcal and adjusted for age, sex, BMI, serum vitamin D, urinary iodine/creatinine, and cycle.
